      "question": "What is the primary function of the Transmission Control Protocol (TCP)?",
      "options": [
        "A) To provide connectionless communication",
        "B) To provide connection-oriented communication",
        "C) To provide error-free communication",
        "D) To provide congestion-free communication"

      "correct": 1,
